stemHtml:
Compare two identical aircraft with different weights, in level flight, flying at the same 200 kt ATC speed restriction:

  • Aircraft A is light and has a VMD of 120 kt
  • Aircraft B is heavy and has a VMD of 180 kt

Which aircraft would achieve the longer glide range, assuming both must maintain 200 kt?

options.a: The heavy aircraft would have the shorter glide range as it requires a higher angle of attack due to weight.
options.b: The light aircraft would have the longer glide range as it has the lowest induced drag.
options.c: The heavy aircraft would have the longer glide range as it has greater momentum.
options.d: The heavy aircraft would have the longer glide range as 200 kt is closest to its VMD speed.
